title: Zira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zira with a Z-Score of +3.66. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zira is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 11.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 36%, and the wind speed is 2.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high, posing a critical threat to the city.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures in Zira.
